name: change-crew
description: Context-light delivery workflow for coordinated software changes.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate software delivery without prompt bloat.
interface.longDescription: Change Crew starts light, then adds high-density agent briefs, Grill Gate questioning, artifacts, critique, review, security checks, verification, and fix loops only when task risk justifies them.
defaultPrompt: Use change-crew in quick profile for this small change.
Use change-crew in standard profile to plan, implement, review, and verify this change.
Use change-crew in full profile for this risky multi-surface change.
